john-f-kennedy.name: John F. Kennedy
john-f-kennedy.description: Stared down nuclear war. "We choose to go to the moon not because it is easy, but because it is hard."

nikita-khrushchev.name: Nikita Khrushchev
nikita-khrushchev.description: Volatile Soviet leader who put missiles in Cuba but also destalinized Russia. "We will bury you!"

ronald-reagan.name: Ronald Reagan
ronald-reagan.description: Challenged the "Evil Empire" to tear down the wall. Star Wars dreamer.

mikhail-gorbachev.name: Mikhail Gorbachev
mikhail-gorbachev.description: Tried to save the USSR with Glasnost, accidentally ended it. Pizza Hut star.

nuclear-war.title: Nuclear Apocalypse ☢️💀
nuclear-war.description: The Cold War turns hot. Civilization ends in 1962.
nuclear-war.divergence_description: Diplomacy fails during the Cuban Missile Crisis.
nuclear-war.present_day_status: The ruins of Washington D.C. are a radioactive swamp. Small tribes of humans survive in the Southern Hemisphere. They tell legends of the "Fire Gods" who burned the world. ☠️☢️

the-exchange.title: The Exchange
the-exchange.description: Missiles fly. 500 million die in the first hour.

nuclear-winter.title: Nuclear Winter
nuclear-winter.description: The sky turns black. Crops fail. The survivors envy the dead.

stone-age.long_term: Humanity returns to the Stone Age

soviet-victory.title: Red World: Soviet Victory 🚩🌍
soviet-victory.description: What if the USSR won the Cold War?
soviet-victory.divergence_description: The US economy collapses in the 1970s while the USSR reforms successfully.
soviet-victory.present_day_status: The General Secretary addresses the Supreme Soviet of Earth. The Red Flag flies over the White House (now the People's Palace). Capitalism is a forgotten nightmare. 🚩☭

red-mars.title: Soviet Mars Landing
red-mars.description: Cosmonauts plant the Red Flag on Mars.

us-collapse.title: US Collapse
us-collapse.description: The USA fragments into warring states. The USSR sends peacekeeping troops.

peaceful-coexistence.title: Star Trek Future: Coexistence 🕊️🚀
peaceful-coexistence.divergence_description: Detente succeeds. Space Race becomes a joint venture.
peaceful-coexistence.present_day_status: The United Earth Federation explores the galaxy. Poverty is eliminated. War is obsolete. 🖖🌍

joint-moon.title: Joint Moon Landing
joint-moon.description: Armstrong and Gagarin step onto the moon together.

cuban-missile-crisis.title: Cuban Missile Crisis (1962)
cuban-missile-crisis.text: President, the Soviets have missiles in Cuba. LeMay wants to bomb them. Khrushchev demands we remove Jupiter missiles from Turkey. The clock is ticking.

blockade.text: Quarantine the island. Give them time to think.
blockade.consequence: Khrushchev blinks. The missiles are removed. We survive.

airstrike.consequence: The Soviets retaliate. New York is vaporized.

backchannel.text: Secret deal: trade Turkey missiles for Cuba.
backchannel.consequence: A fair trade. Peace is secured, but the military is furious.

space-race.title: The Space Race (1969)
space-race.text: We are behind. The Soviets put the first man in space. Now we aim for the moon. But the cost is astronomical.

apollo.text: We choose to go to the moon! Full funding.
apollo.consequence: Eagle has landed. America wins the prestige war.

joint-mission.text: Propose a joint mission with the USSR.
joint-mission.consequence: They accept! The "Soyuz-Apollo" lands on the moon.

military-space.text: Forget the moon. Build orbital weapons.
military-space.consequence: The Soviets do the same. Space becomes a battlefield.

berlin-wall.title: Tear Down This Wall (1987)
berlin-wall.text: Mr. Gorbachev is struggling. The Soviet economy is failing. You are at the Brandenburg Gate.

tear-down.consequence: The Wall falls. The Iron Curtain collapses.

quiet-diplomacy.text: Offer financial aid to prop up the USSR.
quiet-diplomacy.consequence: The USSR survives. The Cold War ends with a whimper, not a bang.
